name: sevencms/seven
description: SevenCMS — modular PHP CMS with plugins, custom content types, RBAC, e-commerce, multi-site.

suggest.ext-gd: Image processing in the Media plugin (resize / WebP generation)
suggest.ext-imagick: Higher-quality image processing alternative to GD
suggest.ext-curl: Required by Stripe and PayPal gateways
suggest.ext-fileinfo: Reliable mime detection on uploaded media
suggest.stripe/stripe-php: Drop-in replacement for the bundled Stripe REST adapter
suggest.aws/aws-sdk-php: Use S3Storage with Cloudflare R2 / AWS S3 / MinIO
suggest.phpmailer/phpmailer: Replace the built-in mail() with SMTP/Mailgun/Postmark
suggest.predis/predis: Redis cache driver fallback when ext-redis is not installed
